name: @yoda.digital/mycelium
description: End-to-end encrypted messaging between Claude Code instances. Curve25519 PFS, Ed25519 TOFU, offline identity envelopes, automatic retransmission, replay protection, zero-plaintext relay.

scripts.build: bun build peer-channel.ts --target node --outdir build && bun build relay.ts --target bun --outdir build && sed -i '1s|.*|#!/usr/bin/env node|' build/peer-channel.js && chmod +x build/peer-channel.js build/relay.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bun run typecheck
scripts.test: bun run test.ts && bun run test-integration.ts && bun run test-replay-poison.ts && bun run test-durability.ts && bun run test-node-smoke.ts

author: Yoda Digital <dev.ungheni@gmail.com>
